requiredSetup: key and exit entities are present

steps.description: Place the player near the key in the fixture scenario draft.
Move right until the player overlaps the key.
Record expected key_collected flag evidence as a draft expectation.

expectedOutcomes.expectation: Key collection flag should appear in run evidence.
Key pickup event should be visible in scenario evidence.

evidenceNeeded.description: Run evidence showing key collection before exit.

unsupportedChecks: GDD asks for mutually exclusive win/loss acceptance and is blocked before draft apply
blockedReasons: Contradictory acceptance text is recorded for reviewer resolution.

expectedEvidence.description: Read-only preview of requirement coverage, scenario drafts, expected outcomes, and evidence needs.

blockedReasons: Contradictory acceptance criteria require review before trusted tests.
boundary: Scenario drafts are untrusted planning artifacts, not trusted tests; untrusted until Rust/local validation; review-gated apply only; no autonomous unrestricted game creation; browser read-only or draft-only
